# TelcoOS

> The agentic VOIP traffic manager. TelcoOS unifies routing, rates, and
> reporting into one intelligent workspace and hands the repetitive parts of
> moving telecom traffic to an agent.

TelcoOS is built for wholesale carriers, VOIP aggregators, and routing desks —
the people who move minutes. An agent watches every route, rate deck, and CDR
stream around the clock and acts on what it sees.

## What the agent does
- Re-routes automatically when a carrier degrades or a cheaper path opens up.
- Flags margin risk the moment a new rate deck would put a route underwater.
- Reconciles carrier invoices against your CDRs and surfaces discrepancies.
- Answers plain-language questions about your traffic and runs the query.

## Capabilities
- Least-cost routing (LCR) across every carrier and dial code, with quality guards.
- Rate deck management — import, version, and diff carrier decks.
- CDR analytics — ASR, ACD, margin, and PDD by route, carrier, and destination.
- Margin monitoring with alerts before a deck change bites.
- Carrier reconciliation against your own CDRs.
- Real-time alerts on degradation, fraud spikes, and margin events.

## How it fits
TelcoOS sits on top of your routing layer and reads your CDRs — it complements
the softswitch and class-4 infrastructure you already run. You set the
guardrails (margin floors, quality thresholds, approved carriers) and decide
whether the agent acts autonomously or proposes changes for you to confirm.

## Contact
- Site: https://telcoos.io
- Email: hello@telcoos.io
